name: chain__this_girl_built_up_an_account_over_18_m
method:
this girl built up an account over 18 months, which now has millions of views.

then she made an app and turned it into $70k mrr.

lesson to be learned here:

social growth engineering + horizontal s

stages.task: generate niche-specific social content (3 posts/day/account) tied to existing app themes
distribute content across platforms with warmup-aware scheduling
scrape metrics daily, compute growth velocity, detect breakout content
when audience threshold hit, execute 7-day app launch sequence with deep-link CTAs
